tasks.title: Create package.json with project manifest and dependencies
tasks.description: Create package.json at project root with: name '@gwrk/cli', type 'module', bin entry './dist/cli.js', dependencies (commander, zod), devDependencies (vitest, @biomejs/biome, tsx, typescript, @types/node). Scripts: build (tsc), test (vitest run), lint (biome check), format (biome format --write).

tasks.title: Create tsconfig.json with ES2022 + ESM + strict
tasks.description: Create tsconfig.json: target ES2022, module NodeNext, moduleResolution NodeNext, strict true, outDir ./dist, rootDir ./src, declaration true, esModuleInterop true, skipLibCheck true, resolveJsonModule true.

tasks.title: Create biome.json lint + format configuration
tasks.description: Create biome.json: formatter enabled (indentStyle space, indentWidth 2), linter enabled with recommended rules, organizeImports enabled. Add rule noExplicitAny with error severity. REMEDIATION: REVIEW FAIL (lint): Missing ignore for dist/ — .agent/rules/coding-style.md. WHERE: biome.json. EXPECTED: "files": { "ignore": ["dist"] }. ACTUAL: (missing). FIX: Add "files": { "ignore": ["dist"] } to biome.json to prevent linting generated files.

tasks.title: Create GwrkConfigSchema and loadConfig in src/utils/config.ts
tasks.description: Implement the Zod schema from contracts/config.md: GwrkConfigSchema with project.name (string), agents.define (enum), agents.implement (enum). Implement loadConfig(projectRoot) that reads .gwrkrc.json, validates with Zod, calls process.exit(1) on missing file or invalid schema. Export GwrkConfig type. NO .default() calls.

tasks.title: Create shell execution wrapper in src/utils/exec.ts
tasks.description: Implement runGate(gateScript) from contracts/tasks.md: execFileSync wrapper that returns { exitCode, stdout, stderr }. Does NOT throw on non-zero exit. Uses child_process.execFileSync with encoding 'utf-8'. Catches ENOENT for missing scripts.

tasks.title: Create CLI entry point in src/cli.ts with Commander
tasks.description: Create src/cli.ts: import Commander, create program with name 'gwrk', version from package.json, description. Register init command (from src/commands/init.ts). Parse process.argv. Add shebang line #!/usr/bin/env node. Wire up config loading at startup (but skip for init command since .gwrkrc.json doesn't exist yet). REMEDIATION: REVIEW FAIL (code): Version not from package.json — FR-001/TC-003. WHERE: src/cli.ts:11. EXPECTED: .version(pkg.version). ACTUAL: .version("0.1.0"). FIX: Import package.json and use its version field.

tasks.title: Create gwrk init command in src/commands/init.ts
tasks.description: Implement FR-001: create .agent/workflows/, .agent/rules/, .specify/templates/, specs/ directories. Create .gwrkrc.json with default config (project.name from directory name, agents.define 'gemini', agents.implement 'codex-cloud'). Idempotent: if .agent/ exists, print 'gwrk already initialized' and exit 0. Copy template files from bundled defaults.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for init and config
tasks.description: Create src/commands/init.test.ts (TR-001): test scaffold creation in temp dir, test idempotency. Create src/utils/config.test.ts (TR-008): test valid config loads, test missing field crashes, test missing file crashes, test invalid type crashes. All tests must use Vitest with beforeEach/afterEach for temp directory cleanup.

tasks.title: Create agent dispatch abstraction in src/utils/agent.ts
tasks.description: Implement dispatchAgent(opts: DispatchOptions) from contracts/agent.md. Define AgentBackend type ('gemini' | 'claude' | 'codex' | 'codex-cloud'). Build CLI args per backend: gemini uses '-p', claude uses '-p --output-format json', codex uses 'exec --full-auto', codex-cloud uses 'run --cloud --non-interactive --full-auto'. Spawn via child_process.execFile. Return { exitCode, stdout, stderr }. REMEDIATION: REVIEW FAIL (uat): Agent Dispatch — Expected: Successful agent invocation. Actual: Crashes with 'Cannot use both a positional prompt and the --prompt (-p) flag together'. WHERE: src/utils/agent.ts. FIX: Refactor argument construction for 'gemini' and 'claude' to pass workflow content via stdin or avoid positional/flag conflict. See spec.md > US-002/US-003.

tasks.title: Create gwrk specify command in src/commands/specify.ts
tasks.description: Implement FR-002: Commander command 'specify' taking <prompt> argument. Load config, resolve backend from config.agents.define, call dispatchAgent with workflowPath '.agent/workflows/specify.md' and the prompt. Register command in cli.ts. REMEDIATION: REVIEW FAIL (uat): US-002 — Expected: spec.md generation. Actual: Agent dispatch crash. FIX: Dependencies on T009. Ensure prompt is passed correctly to backend.

tasks.title: Create gwrk plan command in src/commands/plan.ts
tasks.description: Implement FR-003: Commander command 'plan' taking <feature> argument. Validate specs/<feature>/spec.md exists (exit 1 with 'spec.md not found' if missing). Load config, dispatch agent with '/plan' workflow targeting the feature directory. REMEDIATION: REVIEW FAIL (uat): US-003 — Expected: plan.md generation. Actual: Agent dispatch crash. FIX: Dependencies on T009. Ensure feature directory is passed correctly to backend.

tasks.title: Create gwrk analyze and effort commands
tasks.description: Implement FR-009 (src/commands/analyze.ts): Commander command 'analyze' taking <feature>, dispatches with '/analyze' workflow. Implement FR-010 (src/commands/effort.ts): Commander command 'effort' taking <feature>, dispatches with '/effort' workflow. Register both in cli.ts. REMEDIATION: REVIEW FAIL (uat): US-009/US-010 — Expected: Workflow dispatch. Actual: Agent dispatch crash. FIX: Dependencies on T009.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for agent dispatch commands
tasks.description: Create test files for TR-002 (specify.test.ts), TR-003 (plan.test.ts), TR-009 (analyze.test.ts), TR-010 (effort.test.ts). Mock execFile via vi.mock. Assert correct workflow path, prompt, and backend are passed to dispatchAgent. Test plan command rejects when spec.md is missing. REMEDIATION: REVIEW FAIL (uat): TR-002/TR-003 — Expected: Tests verify real-world CLI compatibility. Actual: Tests pass against broken argument construction. FIX: Update test assertions to match the fixed argument structure from T009.

tasks.title: Create Zod schemas and state management in src/utils/state.ts
tasks.description: Implement from contracts/tasks.md and data-model.md DM-001: TaskStateSchema, PhaseSchema, TaskSchema with Zod. Implement loadTaskState(featureDir) — reads .gwrk/tasks.json, validates with Zod, exits on invalid. Implement saveTaskState(featureDir, state) — validates then writes atomically. Implement markTaskComplete(state, taskId) — pure function, returns new state with status 'completed' and completedAt timestamp. Throws on not-found or already-completed.

tasks.title: Create plan parser in src/utils/parser.ts
tasks.description: Implement parsePlan(planPath) from contracts/tasks.md. Parse plan.md markdown: extract Phase headers (### Phase N: Name), extract file lists, extract Done When assertions. Return { phases: ParsedPhase[] } where ParsedPhase has id, title, and extracted tasks with titles and descriptions derived from the phase content.

tasks.title: Create gate script generator in src/utils/gate-gen.ts
tasks.description: Implement generateGates(featureDir, tasks) from contracts/tasks.md. For each task, write gates/T0xx-gate.sh with: #!/bin/bash header, set -euo pipefail, grep/test assertions derived from the task's Done When criteria. Set chmod +x on each file.

tasks.title: Create history logger in src/utils/history.ts
tasks.description: Implement appendHistory(entry: HistoryEntry) from contracts/tasks.md and data-model.md DM-002. Validate entry with HistoryEntrySchema (Zod). Append JSON line to .gwrk/history.jsonl. Create file if it doesn't exist. Each line is a complete JSON object (JSONL format).

tasks.title: Create gwrk tasks command with generate and done subcommands
tasks.description: Implement src/commands/tasks.ts: Commander command 'tasks' with subcommands. 'generate <feature>': call parsePlan, create .gwrk/tasks.json via saveTaskState, call generateGates. 'done <feature> <taskId>': load state, find task (exit 1 if not found), check not already completed (exit 1), run gate via runGate (exit 1 if fails with 'Gate failed for <taskId>. State unchanged.'), call markTaskComplete, save state, call appendHistory. Register in cli.ts.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for task engine
tasks.description: TR-004 (tasks-generate.test.ts): parsePlan produces valid JSON, gates created with +x. TR-006 (tasks-done.test.ts): passing gate → completed, failing gate → open, missing gate → exit 1, already completed → exit 1. TR-007 (state.test.ts): atomic read/write, Zod rejects invalid state, appendHistory writes valid JSONL.

tasks.title: Add list and next subcommands to gwrk tasks
tasks.description: Implement FR-005 in src/commands/tasks.ts: 'list <feature>' subcommand — loadTaskState, flatten tasks via listTasks, output formatted table or JSON (--json flag). 'next <feature> <phase>' subcommand — call nextTask(state, phaseId), output the task or 'All tasks completed' message. --json flag outputs raw JSON.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for task query commands
tasks.description: TR-005 (tasks-query.test.ts): list returns all tasks with correct count, next returns first open task for phase, next returns null when all completed, --json flag outputs valid JSON parseable by jq.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for full lifecycle
tasks.description: VR-001 (tests/integration/lifecycle.test.ts): E2E test — init temp dir → create mock spec/plan → tasks generate → verify tasks.json + gates → mock passing gate → tasks done → verify state updated + history.jsonl entry. VR-002: Same but with failing gate → verify state NOT changed, exit 1. VR-003 (tests/integration/config.test.ts): Remove required field from .gwrkrc.json → verify crash with Zod error.
